Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4000 "EXODUS-1000-4000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Exodus.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This game has a BASIC loading screen which uses a SYS command to start the game when it has finished loading. Therefore the following steps were taken to use this: 1. Line 100 in the BASIC program was changed from F=1:LOAD to just F=3. This prevents the BASIC program from loading the game files from tape. 2. The SYS 16384 instruction on line 130 was changed to SYS 4532 ($1100). 3. A new routine was placed at $1000 which sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers and runs the loading screen program. 4. A new routine was placed at $1100 which waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game by jumping to $4000.
Also zeroed out the following memory ranges as they contained an unnecessary repeating memory block:
$0A60 - $3DFF $6570 - $7AFF $A000 - $BFFF $CBF0 - $CFFF
